title: ProgressUpdate
description: Real-time progress update for SSE streaming during ingestion pipeline execution

progressNode.description: One node of the hierarchical progress tree. A node counts its direct children (root counts databases, a database counts schemas, a schema counts tables).

label.description: Display name of this node (database or schema name; empty for the run root)

entityType.description: Type of children this node counts (Database, DatabaseSchema, Table, ...)

expected.description: Number of children, or null when the producer was iterated lazily

overflow.description: Active children beyond the per-parent display cap

children.description: Active or relevant child nodes only

progress.description: Root of the hierarchical progress tree for this run

globalCounters.description: Run-level counters that survive scope pruning (e.g. Database, DatabaseSchema, Workspace). Each carries done and an optional upfront total.

estimatedSecondsRemaining.description: Estimated seconds until the run completes; null when not yet computable

totalAssetsIngested.description: Monotonic count of leaf assets ingested so far (tables + stored procedures + other leaf entities). Survives scope pruning and is present on the terminal PIPELINE_COMPLETE event, so it carries the run's final asset total.

currentEntity.description: FQN of the entity currently being processed
